004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.bean.openapi3;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.internal.ConverterUtils.*;
023
024import java.util.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
028
029/**
030 * Allows the definition of input and output data types.
031 *
032 * <p>
033 * The Schema Object allows the definition of input and output data types, including objects, primitives, and arrays.
034 * This object is an extended subset of the JSON Schema Specification Draft 4, with additional extensions provided
035 * by the OpenAPI Specification to allow for more complete documentation.
036 *
037 * <h5 class='section'>OpenAPI Specification:</h5>
038 * <p>
039 * The Schema Object supports all properties from JSON Schema Draft 4, including but not limited to:
040 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
041 *    <li><c>type</c> (string) - The data type. Values: <js>"string"</js>, <js>"number"</js>, <js>"integer"</js>, <js>"boolean"</js>, <js>"array"</js>, <js>"object"</js>
042 *    <li><c>format</c> (string) - The format modifier (e.g., <js>"int32"</js>, <js>"int64"</js>, <js>"float"</js>, <js>"double"</js>, <js>"date"</js>, <js>"date-time"</js>)
043 *    <li><c>title</c> (string) - A short title for the schema
044 *    <li><c>description</c> (string) - A description of the schema (CommonMark syntax may be used)
045 *    <li><c>default</c> (any) - The default value
046 *    <li><c>multipleOf</c> (number) - Must be a multiple of this value
047 *    <li><c>maximum</c> (number) - Maximum value (inclusive by default)
048 *    <li><c>exclusiveMaximum</c> (boolean) - If true, maximum is exclusive
049 *    <li><c>minimum</c> (number) - Minimum value (inclusive by default)
050 *    <li><c>exclusiveMinimum</c> (boolean) - If true, minimum is exclusive
051 *    <li><c>maxLength</c> (integer) - Maximum string length
052 *    <li><c>minLength</c> (integer) - Minimum string length
053 *    <li><c>pattern</c> (string) - Regular expression pattern the string must match
054 *    <li><c>maxItems</c> (integer) - Maximum array length
055 *    <li><c>minItems</c> (integer) - Minimum array length
056 *    <li><c>uniqueItems</c> (boolean) - If true, array items must be unique
057 *    <li><c>maxProperties</c> (integer) - Maximum number of object properties
058 *    <li><c>minProperties</c> (integer) - Minimum number of object properties
059 *    <li><c>required</c> (array of string) - Required property names
060 *    <li><c>enum</c> (array) - Possible values for this schema
061 *    <li><c>properties</c> (map of {@link SchemaInfo}) - Object property definitions
062 *    <li><c>items</c> ({@link Items}) - Schema for array items
063 *    <li><c>allOf</c> (array of {@link SchemaInfo}) - Must validate against all schemas
064 *    <li><c>oneOf</c> (array of {@link SchemaInfo}) - Must validate against exactly one schema
065 *    <li><c>anyOf</c> (array of {@link SchemaInfo}) - Must validate against any schema
066 *    <li><c>not</c> ({@link SchemaInfo}) - Must not validate against this schema
067 *    <li><c>nullable</c> (boolean) - Allows the value to be null (OpenAPI 3.0 extension)
068 *    <li><c>discriminator</c> ({@link Discriminator}) - Discriminator for polymorphism (OpenAPI extension)
069 *    <li><c>readOnly</c> (boolean) - Relevant only for Schema properties (OpenAPI extension)
070 *    <li><c>writeOnly</c> (boolean) - Relevant only for Schema properties (OpenAPI extension)
071 *    <li><c>xml</c> ({@link Xml}) - XML representation details (OpenAPI extension)
072 *    <li><c>externalDocs</c> ({@link ExternalDocumentation}) - Additional external documentation (OpenAPI extension)
073 *    <li><c>example</c> (any) - Example value (OpenAPI extension)
074 *    <li><c>deprecated</c> (boolean) - Specifies that the schema is deprecated (OpenAPI extension)
075 * </ul>
076 *
077 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
078 * <p class='bjava'>
079 *    <jc>// Create a schema for a Pet object</jc>
080 *    SchemaInfo <jv>schema</jv> = <jk>new</jk> SchemaInfo()
081 *       .setType(<js>"object"</js>)
082 *       .setRequired(<js>"id"</js>, <js>"name"</js>)
083 *       .setProperties(
084 *          JsonMap.<jsm>of</jsm>(
085 *             <js>"id"</js>, <jk>new</jk> SchemaInfo().setType(<js>"integer"</js>).setFormat(<js>"int64"</js>),
086 *             <js>"name"</js>, <jk>new</jk> SchemaInfo().setType(<js>"string"</js>),
087 *             <js>"tag"</js>, <jk>new</jk> SchemaInfo().setType(<js>"string"</js>)
088 *          )
089 *       );
090 * </p>
091 *
092 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
093 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://spec.openapis.org/oas/v3.0.0#schema-object">OpenAPI Specification &gt; Schema Object</a>
094 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/docs/specification/data-models/">OpenAPI Data Models</a>
095 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://json-schema.org/">JSON Schema Specification</a>
096 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauBeanOpenApi3">juneau-bean-openapi-v3</a>
097 * </ul>
098 */
099@SuppressWarnings({
100   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
101   "java:S116" // Field names intentionally match JSON property names
102})
103public class SchemaInfo extends OpenApiElement {
104
105   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
106   private static final String ARG_property = "property";
107
108   // Property name constants
109   private static final String PROP_additionalProperties = "additionalProperties";
110   private static final String PROP_allOf = "allOf";
111   private static final String PROP_anyOf = "anyOf";
112   private static final String PROP_default = "default";
113   private static final String PROP_deprecated = "deprecated";
114   private static final String PROP_description = "description";
115   private static final String PROP_discriminator = "discriminator";
116   private static final String PROP_enum = "enum";
117   private static final String PROP_example = "example";
118   private static final String PROP_exclusiveMaximum = "exclusiveMaximum";
119   private static final String PROP_exclusiveMinimum = "exclusiveMinimum";
120   private static final String PROP_externalDocs = "externalDocs";
121   private static final String PROP_format = "format";
122   private static final String PROP_items = "items";
123   private static final String PROP_maxItems = "maxItems";
124   private static final String PROP_maxLength = "maxLength";
125   private static final String PROP_maxProperties = "maxProperties";
126   private static final String PROP_maximum = "maximum";
127   private static final String PROP_minItems = "minItems";
128   private static final String PROP_minLength = "minLength";
129   private static final String PROP_minProperties = "minProperties";
130   private static final String PROP_minimum = "minimum";
131   private static final String PROP_multipleOf = "multipleOf";
132   private static final String PROP_not = "not";
133   private static final String PROP_nullable = "nullable";
134   private static final String PROP_oneOf = "oneOf";
135   private static final String PROP_pattern = "pattern";
136   private static final String PROP_properties = "properties";
137   private static final String PROP_readOnly = "readOnly";
138   private static final String PROP_required = "required";
139   private static final String PROP_title = "title";
140   private static final String PROP_type = "type";
141   private static final String PROP_uniqueItems = "uniqueItems";
142   private static final String PROP_writeOnly = "writeOnly";
143   private static final String PROP_xml = "xml";
144   private static final String PROP_ref = "$ref";
145
146   private String format;
147   private String title;
148   private String description;
149   private String pattern;
150   private String ref;
151   private String type;
152   private Number multipleOf;
153   private Number maximum;
154   private Number minimum;
155   private Integer maxLength;
156   private Integer minLength;
157   private Integer maxItems;
158   private Integer minItems;
159   private Integer maxProperties;
160   private Integer minProperties;
161   private Boolean exclusiveMaximum;
162   private Boolean exclusiveMinimum;
163   private Boolean uniqueItems;
164   private Boolean nullable;
165   private Boolean writeOnly;
166   private Boolean readOnly;
167   private Boolean deprecated;
168   private Object default_;
169   private Object example;
170   private Items items;
171   private Xml xml;
172   private ExternalDocumentation externalDocs;
173   private List<Object> allOf = list();
174   private List<Object> oneOf = list();
175   private List<Object> anyOf = list();
176   private List<Object> enum_ = list();
177   private List<String> required = list();
178   private Discriminator discriminator;
179   private Map<String,SchemaInfo> properties;
180   private SchemaInfo additionalProperties;
181   private SchemaInfo not;
182
183   /**
184    * Default constructor.
185    */
186   public SchemaInfo() {}
187
188   /**
189    * Copy constructor.
190    *
191    * @param copyFrom The object to copy.
192    */
193   public SchemaInfo(SchemaInfo copyFrom) {
194      super(copyFrom);
195
196      this.format = copyFrom.format;
197      this.title = copyFrom.title;
198      this.description = copyFrom.description;
199      this.ref = copyFrom.ref;
200      this.nullable = copyFrom.nullable;
201      this.writeOnly = copyFrom.writeOnly;
202      this.deprecated = copyFrom.deprecated;
203      this.pattern = copyFrom.pattern;
204      this.type = copyFrom.type;
205      this.discriminator = copyFrom.discriminator;
206      this.multipleOf = copyFrom.multipleOf;
207      this.maximum = copyFrom.maximum;
208      this.minimum = copyFrom.minimum;
209      this.maxLength = copyFrom.maxLength;
210      this.minLength = copyFrom.minLength;
211      this.maxItems = copyFrom.maxItems;
212      this.minItems = copyFrom.minItems;
213      this.maxProperties = copyFrom.maxProperties;
214      this.minProperties = copyFrom.minProperties;
215      this.exclusiveMaximum = copyFrom.exclusiveMaximum;
216      this.exclusiveMinimum = copyFrom.exclusiveMinimum;
217      this.uniqueItems = copyFrom.uniqueItems;
218      this.readOnly = copyFrom.readOnly;
219      this.default_ = copyFrom.default_;
220      this.example = copyFrom.example;
221      this.items = copyFrom.items == null ? null : copyFrom.items.copy();
222      this.xml = copyFrom.xml == null ? null : copyFrom.xml.copy();
223      this.externalDocs = copyFrom.externalDocs == null ? null : copyFrom.externalDocs.copy();
224      enum_.addAll(copyFrom.enum_);
225      allOf.addAll(copyFrom.allOf);
226      required.addAll(copyFrom.required);
227      anyOf.addAll(copyFrom.anyOf);
228      oneOf.addAll(copyFrom.oneOf);
229      this.properties = copyOf(copyFrom.properties, SchemaInfo::copy);
230      this.additionalProperties = copyFrom.additionalProperties == null ? null : copyFrom.additionalProperties.copy();
231      this.not = copyFrom.not == null ? null : copyFrom.not.copy();
232   }
233
234   /**
235    * Adds one or more values to the <property>allOf</property> property.
236    *
237    * @param values
238    *    The values to add to this property.
239    *    <br>Valid types:
240    *    <ul>
241    *       <li><code>Object</code>
242    *       <li><code>Collection&lt;Object&gt;</code>
243    *       <li><code>String</code> - JSON array representation of <code>Collection&lt;Object&gt;</code>
244    *          <h5 class='figure'>Example:</h5>
245    *          <p class='bcode'>
246    *    allOf(<js>"['foo','bar']"</js>);
247    *          </p>
248    *       <li><code>String</code> - Individual values
249    *          <h5 class='figure'>Example:</h5>
250    *          <p class='bcode'>
251    *    allOf(<js>"foo"</js>, <js>"bar"</js>);
252    *          </p>
253    *    </ul>
254    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
255    * @return This object
256    */
257   public SchemaInfo addAllOf(Object...values) {
258      if (nn(values))
259         for (var v : values)
260            if (nn(v))
261               allOf.add(v);
262      return this;
263   }
264
265   /**
266    * Adds one or more values to the <property>allOf</property> property.
267    *
268    * @param values
269    *    The values to add to this property.
270    *    <br>Valid types:
271    *    <ul>
272    *       <li><code>Object</code>
273    *       <li><code>Collection&lt;Object&gt;</code>
274    *       <li><code>String</code> - JSON array representation of <code>Collection&lt;Object&gt;</code>
275    *          <h5 class='figure'>Example:</h5>
276    *          <p class='bcode'>
277    *    allOf(<js>"['foo','bar']"</js>);
278    *          </p>
279    *       <li><code>String</code> - Individual values
280    *          <h5 class='figure'>Example:</h5>
281    *          <p class='bcode'>
282    *    allOf(<js>"foo"</js>, <js>"bar"</js>);
283    *          </p>
284    *    </ul>
285    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
286    * @return This object
287    */
288   public SchemaInfo addAnyOf(Object...values) {
289      if (nn(values))
290         for (var v : values)
291            if (nn(v))
292               anyOf.add(v);
293      return this;
294   }
295
296   /**
297    * Adds one or more values to the <property>enum</property> property.
298    *
299    * @param values
300    *    The values to add to this property.
301    *    <br>Valid types:
302    *    <ul>
303    *       <li><code>Object</code>
304    *       <li><code>Collection&lt;Object&gt;</code>
305    *       <li><code>String</code> - JSON array representation of <code>Collection&lt;Object&gt;</code>
306    *          <h5 class='figure'>Example:</h5>
307    *          <p class='bcode'>
308    *    enum_(<js>"['foo','bar']"</js>);
309    *          </p>
310    *       <li><code>String</code> - Individual values
311    *          <h5 class='figure'>Example:</h5>
312    *          <p class='bcode'>
313    *    enum_(<js>"foo"</js>, <js>"bar"</js>);
314    *          </p>
315    *    </ul>
316    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
317    * @return This object
318    */
319   public SchemaInfo addEnum(Object...values) {
320      if (nn(values))
321         for (var v : values)
322            if (nn(v))
323               enum_.add(v);
324      return this;
325   }
326
327   /**
328    * Adds one or more values to the <property>allOf</property> property.
329    *
330    * @param values
331    *    The values to add to this property.
332    *    <br>Valid types:
333    *    <ul>
334    *       <li><code>Object</code>
335    *       <li><code>Collection&lt;Object&gt;</code>
336    *       <li><code>String</code> - JSON array representation of <code>Collection&lt;Object&gt;</code>
337    *          <h5 class='figure'>Example:</h5>
338    *          <p class='bcode'>
339    *    allOf(<js>"['foo','bar']"</js>);
340    *          </p>
341    *       <li><code>String</code> - Individual values
342    *          <h5 class='figure'>Example:</h5>
343    *          <p class='bcode'>
344    *    allOf(<js>"foo"</js>, <js>"bar"</js>);
345    *          </p>
346    *    </ul>
347    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
348    * @return This object
349    */
350   public SchemaInfo addOneOf(Object...values) {
351      if (nn(values))
352         for (var v : values)
353            if (nn(v))
354               oneOf.add(v);
355      return this;
356   }
357
358   /**
359    * Same as {@link #addRequired(String...)}.
360    *
361    * @param values
362    *    The new value for this property.
363    *    <br>Valid types:
364    *    <ul>
365    *       <li><code>Collection&lt;String&gt;</code>
366    *       <li><code>String</code> - JSON array representation of <code>Collection&lt;String&gt;</code>
367    *          <h5 class='figure'>Example:</h5>
368    *          <p class='bcode'>
369    *    schemes(<js>"['scheme1','scheme2']"</js>);
370    *          </p>
371    *       <li><code>String</code> - Individual values
372    *          <h5 class='figure'>Example:</h5>
373    *          <p class='bcode'>
374    *    schemes(<js>"scheme1</js>, <js>"scheme2"</js>);
375    *          </p>
376    *    </ul>
377    * @return This object
378    */
379   public SchemaInfo addRequired(String...values) {
380      if (nn(values))
381         for (var v : values)
382            if (nn(v))
383               required.add(v);
384      return this;
385   }
386
387   /**
388    * Make a deep copy of this object.
389    *
390    * @return A deep copy of this object.
391    */
392   public SchemaInfo copy() {
393      return new SchemaInfo(this);
394   }
395
396   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
397   @SuppressWarnings({
398      "java:S1479" // Switch statement has 37 cases, exceeding recommended limit of 30 - necessary for bean property mapping
399   })
400   public <T> T get(String property, Class<T> type) {
401      assertArgNotNull(ARG_property, property);
402      return switch (property) {
403         case PROP_format -> toType(getFormat(), type);
404         case PROP_title -> toType(getTitle(), type);
405         case PROP_description -> toType(getDescription(), type);
406         case PROP_default -> toType(getDefault(), type);
407         case PROP_multipleOf -> toType(getMultipleOf(), type);
408         case PROP_maximum -> toType(getMaximum(), type);
409         case PROP_exclusiveMaximum -> toType(getExclusiveMaximum(), type);
410         case PROP_minimum -> toType(getMinimum(), type);
411         case PROP_exclusiveMinimum -> toType(getExclusiveMinimum(), type);
412         case PROP_maxLength -> toType(getMaxLength(), type);
413         case PROP_minLength -> toType(getMinLength(), type);
414         case PROP_pattern -> toType(getPattern(), type);
415         case PROP_maxItems -> toType(getMaxItems(), type);
416         case PROP_minItems -> toType(getMinItems(), type);
417         case PROP_uniqueItems -> toType(getUniqueItems(), type);
418         case PROP_maxProperties -> toType(getMaxProperties(), type);
419         case PROP_minProperties -> toType(getMinProperties(), type);
420         case PROP_required -> toType(getRequired(), type);
421         case PROP_enum -> toType(getEnum(), type);
422         case PROP_type -> toType(getType(), type);
423         case PROP_items -> toType(getItems(), type);
424         case PROP_allOf -> toType(getAllOf(), type);
425         case PROP_oneOf -> toType(getOneOf(), type);
426         case PROP_anyOf -> toType(getAnyOf(), type);
427         case PROP_properties -> toType(getProperties(), type);
428         case PROP_additionalProperties -> toType(getAdditionalProperties(), type);
429         case PROP_not -> toType(getNot(), type);
430         case PROP_nullable -> toType(getNullable(), type);
431         case PROP_deprecated -> toType(getDeprecated(), type);
432         case PROP_discriminator -> toType(getDiscriminator(), type);
433         case PROP_readOnly -> toType(getReadOnly(), type);
434         case PROP_writeOnly -> toType(getWriteOnly(), type);
435         case PROP_xml -> toType(getXml(), type);
436         case PROP_externalDocs -> toType(getExternalDocs(), type);
437         case PROP_example -> toType(getExample(), type);
438         case PROP_ref -> toType(getRef(), type);
439         default -> super.get(property, type);
440      };
441   }
442
443   /**
444    * Bean property getter:  <property>additionalProperties</property>.
445    *
446    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
447    */
448   public SchemaInfo getAdditionalProperties() { return additionalProperties; }
449
450   /**
451    * Bean property getter:  <property>allOf</property>.
452    *
453    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
454    */
455   public List<Object> getAllOf() { return nullIfEmpty(allOf); }
456
457   /**
458    * Bean property getter:  <property>allOf</property>.
459    *
460    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
461    */
462   public List<Object> getAnyOf() { return nullIfEmpty(anyOf); }
463
464   /**
465    * Bean property getter:  <property>default</property>.
466    *
467    * <p>
468    * Unlike JSON Schema, the value MUST conform to the defined type for the Schema Object.
469    *
470    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
471    */
472   public Object getDefault() { return default_; }
473
474   /**
475    * Bean property getter:  <property>deprecated</property>.
476    *
477    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
478    */
479   public Boolean getDeprecated() { return deprecated; }
480
481   /**
482    * Bean property getter:  <property>description</property>.
483    *
484    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
485    */
486   public String getDescription() { return description; }
487
488   /**
489    * Bean property getter:  <property>discriminator</property>.
490    *
491    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
492    */
493   public Discriminator getDiscriminator() { return discriminator; }
494
495   /**
496    * Bean property getter:  <property>enum</property>.
497    *
498    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
499    */
500   public List<Object> getEnum() { return nullIfEmpty(enum_); }
501
502   /**
503    * Bean property getter:  <property>example</property>.
504    *
505    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
506    */
507   public Object getExample() { return example; }
508
509   /**
510    * Bean property getter:  <property>exclusiveMaximum</property>.
511    *
512    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
513    */
514   public Boolean getExclusiveMaximum() { return exclusiveMaximum; }
515
516   /**
517    * Bean property getter:  <property>exclusiveMinimum</property>.
518    *
519    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
520    */
521   public Boolean getExclusiveMinimum() { return exclusiveMinimum; }
522
523   /**
524    * Bean property getter:  <property>externalDocs</property>.
525    *
526    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
527    */
528   public ExternalDocumentation getExternalDocs() { return externalDocs; }
529
530   /**
531    * Bean property getter:  <property>format</property>.
532    *
533    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
534    */
535   public String getFormat() { return format; }
536
537   /**
538    * Bean property getter:  <property>items</property>.
539    *
540    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
541    */
542   public Items getItems() { return items; }
543
544   /**
545    * Bean property getter:  <property>maximum</property>.
546    *
547    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
548    */
549   public Number getMaximum() { return maximum; }
550
551   /**
552    * Bean property getter:  <property>maxItems</property>.
553    *
554    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
555    */
556   public Integer getMaxItems() { return maxItems; }
557
558   /**
559    * Bean property getter:  <property>maxLength</property>.
560    *
561    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
562    */
563   public Integer getMaxLength() { return maxLength; }
564
565   /**
566    * Bean property getter:  <property>maxProperties</property>.
567    *
568    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
569    */
570   public Integer getMaxProperties() { return maxProperties; }
571
572   /**
573    * Bean property getter:  <property>minimum</property>.
574    *
575    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
576    */
577   public Number getMinimum() { return minimum; }
578
579   /**
580    * Bean property getter:  <property>minItems</property>.
581    *
582    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
583    */
584   public Integer getMinItems() { return minItems; }
585
586   /**
587    * Bean property getter:  <property>minLength</property>.
588    *
589    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
590    */
591   public Integer getMinLength() { return minLength; }
592
593   /**
594    * Bean property getter:  <property>minProperties</property>.
595    *
596    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
597    */
598   public Integer getMinProperties() { return minProperties; }
599
600   /**
601    * Bean property getter:  <property>multipleOf</property>.
602    *
603    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
604    */
605   public Number getMultipleOf() { return multipleOf; }
606
607   /**
608    * Bean property getter:  <property>not</property>.
609    *
610    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
611    */
612   public SchemaInfo getNot() { return not; }
613
614   /**
615    * Bean property getter:  <property>uniqueItems</property>.
616    *
617    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
618    */
619   public Boolean getNullable() { return nullable; }
620
621   /**
622    * Bean property getter:  <property>allOf</property>.
623    *
624    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
625    */
626   public List<Object> getOneOf() { return nullIfEmpty(oneOf); }
627
628   /**
629    * Bean property getter:  <property>pattern</property>.
630    *
631    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
632    */
633   public String getPattern() { return pattern; }
634
635   /**
636    * Bean property getter:  <property>properties</property>.
637    *
638    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
639    */
640   public Map<String,SchemaInfo> getProperties() { return properties; }
641
642   /**
643    * Bean property getter:  <property>readOnly</property>.
644    *
645    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
646    */
647   public Boolean getReadOnly() { return readOnly; }
648
649   /**
650    * Bean property getter:  <property>$ref</property>.
651    *
652    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
653    */
654   @BeanProp("$ref")
655   public String getRef() { return ref; }
656
657   /**
658    * Bean property getter:  <property>required</property>.
659    *
660    * <p>
661    * The list of required properties.
662    *
663    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
664    */
665   public List<String> getRequired() { return nullIfEmpty(required); }
666
667   /**
668    * Bean property getter:  <property>title</property>.
669    *
670    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
671    */
672   public String getTitle() { return title; }
673
674   /**
675    * Bean property getter:  <property>type</property>.
676    *
677    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
678    */
679   public String getType() { return type; }
680
681   /**
682    * Bean property getter:  <property>uniqueItems</property>.
683    *
684    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
685    */
686   public Boolean getUniqueItems() { return uniqueItems; }
687
688   /**
689    * Bean property getter:  <property>WriteOnly</property>.
690    *
691    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
692    */
693   public Boolean getWriteOnly() { return writeOnly; }
694
695   /**
696    * Bean property getter:  <property>xml</property>.
697    *
698    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
699    */
700   public Xml getXml() { return xml; }
701
702   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
703   public Set<String> keySet() {
704      // @formatter:off
705      var s = setb(String.class)
706         .addIf(nn(ref), PROP_ref)
707         .addIf(nn(additionalProperties), PROP_additionalProperties)
708         .addIf(ne(allOf), PROP_allOf)
709         .addIf(ne(anyOf), PROP_anyOf)
710         .addIf(nn(default_), PROP_default)
711         .addIf(nn(deprecated), PROP_deprecated)
712         .addIf(nn(description), PROP_description)
713         .addIf(nn(discriminator), PROP_discriminator)
714         .addIf(ne(enum_), PROP_enum)
715         .addIf(nn(example), PROP_example)
716         .addIf(nn(exclusiveMaximum), PROP_exclusiveMaximum)
717         .addIf(nn(exclusiveMinimum), PROP_exclusiveMinimum)
718         .addIf(nn(externalDocs), PROP_externalDocs)
719         .addIf(nn(format), PROP_format)
720         .addIf(nn(items), PROP_items)
721         .addIf(nn(maxItems), PROP_maxItems)
722         .addIf(nn(maxLength), PROP_maxLength)
723         .addIf(nn(maxProperties), PROP_maxProperties)
724         .addIf(nn(maximum), PROP_maximum)
725         .addIf(nn(minItems), PROP_minItems)
726         .addIf(nn(minLength), PROP_minLength)
727         .addIf(nn(minProperties), PROP_minProperties)
728         .addIf(nn(minimum), PROP_minimum)
729         .addIf(nn(multipleOf), PROP_multipleOf)
730         .addIf(nn(not), PROP_not)
731         .addIf(nn(nullable), PROP_nullable)
732         .addIf(ne(oneOf), PROP_oneOf)
733         .addIf(nn(pattern), PROP_pattern)
734         .addIf(nn(properties), PROP_properties)
735         .addIf(nn(readOnly), PROP_readOnly)
736         .addIf(ne(required), PROP_required)
737         .addIf(nn(title), PROP_title)
738         .addIf(nn(type), PROP_type)
739         .addIf(nn(uniqueItems), PROP_uniqueItems)
740         .addIf(nn(writeOnly), PROP_writeOnly)
741         .addIf(nn(xml), PROP_xml)
742         .build();
743      // @formatter:on
744      return new MultiSet<>(s, super.keySet());
745   }
746
747   /**
748    * Resolves any <js>"$ref"</js> attributes in this element.
749    *
750    * @param openApi The swagger document containing the definitions.
751    * @param refStack Keeps track of previously-visited references so that we don't cause recursive loops.
752    * @param maxDepth
753    *    The maximum depth to resolve references.
754    *    <br>After that level is reached, <code>$ref</code> references will be left alone.
755    *    <br>Useful if you have very complex models and you don't want your swagger page to be overly-complex.
756    * @return
757    *    This object with references resolved.
758    *    <br>May or may not be the same object.
759    */
760   public SchemaInfo resolveRefs(OpenApi openApi, Deque<String> refStack, int maxDepth) {
761
762      if (nn(ref)) {
763         if (refStack.contains(ref) || refStack.size() >= maxDepth)
764            return this;
765         refStack.addLast(ref);
766         var r = openApi.findRef(ref, SchemaInfo.class);
767         r = r.resolveRefs(openApi, refStack, maxDepth);
768         refStack.removeLast();
769         return r;
770      }
771
772      if (nn(items))
773         items = items.resolveRefs(openApi, refStack, maxDepth);
774
775      if (nn(properties))
776         for (var e : properties.entrySet())
777            e.setValue(e.getValue().resolveRefs(openApi, refStack, maxDepth));
778
779      if (nn(additionalProperties))
780         additionalProperties = additionalProperties.resolveRefs(openApi, refStack, maxDepth);
781
782      this.example = null;
783
784      return this;
785   }
786
787   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
788   @SuppressWarnings({
789      "java:S1479" // Switch statement has 37 cases, exceeding recommended limit of 30 - necessary for bean property mapping
790   })
791   public SchemaInfo set(String property, Object value) {
792      assertArgNotNull(ARG_property, property);
793      return switch (property) {
794         case PROP_ref -> setRef(value);
795         case PROP_additionalProperties -> setAdditionalProperties(toType(value, SchemaInfo.class));
796         case PROP_allOf -> setAllOf(listb(Object.class).addAny(value).sparse().build());
797         case PROP_anyOf -> setAnyOf(listb(Object.class).addAny(value).sparse().build());
798         case PROP_default -> setDefault(value);
799         case PROP_deprecated -> setDeprecated(toBoolean(value));
800         case PROP_description -> setDescription(s(value));
801         case PROP_discriminator -> setDiscriminator(toType(value, Discriminator.class));
802         case PROP_enum -> setEnum(listb(Object.class).addAny(value).sparse().build());
803         case PROP_example -> setExample(value);
804         case PROP_exclusiveMaximum -> setExclusiveMaximum(toBoolean(value));
805         case PROP_exclusiveMinimum -> setExclusiveMinimum(toBoolean(value));
806         case PROP_externalDocs -> setExternalDocs(toType(value, ExternalDocumentation.class));
807         case PROP_format -> setFormat(s(value));
808         case PROP_items -> setItems(toType(value, Items.class));
809         case PROP_maxItems -> setMaxItems(toInteger(value));
810         case PROP_maxLength -> setMaxLength(toInteger(value));
811         case PROP_maxProperties -> setMaxProperties(toInteger(value));
812         case PROP_maximum -> setMaximum(toNumber(value));
813         case PROP_minItems -> setMinItems(toInteger(value));
814         case PROP_minLength -> setMinLength(toInteger(value));
815         case PROP_minProperties -> setMinProperties(toInteger(value));
816         case PROP_minimum -> setMinimum(toNumber(value));
817         case PROP_multipleOf -> setMultipleOf(toNumber(value));
818         case PROP_not -> setNot(toType(value, SchemaInfo.class));
819         case PROP_nullable -> setNullable(toBoolean(value));
820         case PROP_oneOf -> setOneOf(listb(Object.class).addAny(value).sparse().build());
821         case PROP_pattern -> setPattern(s(value));
822         case PROP_properties -> setProperties(toMapBuilder(value, String.class, SchemaInfo.class).sparse().build());
823         case PROP_readOnly -> setReadOnly(toBoolean(value));
824         case PROP_required -> setRequired(listb(String.class).addAny(value).sparse().build());
825         case PROP_title -> setTitle(s(value));
826         case PROP_type -> setType(s(value));
827         case PROP_uniqueItems -> setUniqueItems(toBoolean(value));
828         case PROP_writeOnly -> setWriteOnly(toBoolean(value));
829         case PROP_xml -> setXml(toType(value, Xml.class));
830         default -> {
831            super.set(property, value);
832            yield this;
833         }
834      };
835   }
836
837   /**
838    * Bean property setter:  <property>additionalProperties</property>.
839    *
840    * @param value
841    *    The new value for this property.
842    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
843    * @return This object
844    */
845   public SchemaInfo setAdditionalProperties(SchemaInfo value) {
846      additionalProperties = value;
847      return this;
848   }
849
850   /**
851    * Bean property setter:  <property>allOf</property>.
852    *
853    * @param value
854    *    The new value for this property.
855    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
856    * @return This object
857    */
858   public SchemaInfo setAllOf(Collection<Object> value) {
859      allOf.clear();
860      if (nn(value))
861         allOf.addAll(value);
862      return this;
863   }
864
865   /**
866    * Bean property setter:  <property>allOf</property>.
867    *
868    * @param value
869    *    The new value for this property.
870    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
871    * @return This object
872    */
873   public SchemaInfo setAnyOf(Collection<Object> value) {
874      anyOf.clear();
875      if (nn(value))
876         anyOf.addAll(value);
877      return this;
878   }
879
880   /**
881    * Bean property setter:  <property>default</property>.
882    *
883    * <p>
884    * Unlike JSON Schema, the value MUST conform to the defined type for the Schema Object.
885    *
886    * @param value
887    *    The new value for this property.
888    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
889    * @return This object
890    */
891   public SchemaInfo setDefault(Object value) {
892      default_ = value;
893      return this;
894   }
895
896   /**
897    * Bean property setter:  <property>deprecated</property>.
898    *
899    * @param value
900    *    The new value for this property.
901    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
902    * @return This object
903    */
904   public SchemaInfo setDeprecated(Boolean value) {
905      deprecated = value;
906      return this;
907   }
908
909   /**
910    * Bean property setter:  <property>description</property>.
911    *
912    * @param value
913    *    The new value for this property.
914    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
915    * @return This object
916    */
917   public SchemaInfo setDescription(String value) {
918      description = value;
919      return this;
920   }
921
922   /**
923    * Bean property setter:  <property>discriminator</property>.
924    *
925    * @param value
926    *    The new value for this property.
927    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
928    * @return This object
929    */
930   public SchemaInfo setDiscriminator(Discriminator value) {
931      discriminator = value;
932      return this;
933   }
934
935   /**
936    * Bean property setter:  <property>enum</property>.
937    *
938    * @param value
939    *    The new value for this property.
940    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
941    * @return This object
942    */
943   public SchemaInfo setEnum(Collection<Object> value) {
944      enum_.clear();
945      if (nn(value))
946         enum_.addAll(value);
947      return this;
948   }
949
950   /**
951    * Bean property setter:  <property>example</property>.
952    *
953    * @param value
954    *    The new value for this property.
955    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
956    * @return This object
957    */
958   public SchemaInfo setExample(Object value) {
959      example = value;
960      return this;
961   }
962
963   /**
964    * Bean property setter:  <property>exclusiveMaximum</property>.
965    *
966    * @param value
967    *    The new value for this property.
968    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
969    * @return This object
970    */
971   public SchemaInfo setExclusiveMaximum(Boolean value) {
972      exclusiveMaximum = value;
973      return this;
974   }
975
976   /**
977    * Bean property setter:  <property>exclusiveMinimum</property>.
978    *

984   public SchemaInfo setExclusiveMinimum(Boolean value) {
985      exclusiveMinimum = value;
986      return this;
987   }

989   /**
990    * Bean property setter:  <property>externalDocs</property>.
991    *
992    * @param value
993    *    The new value for this property.
994    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
995    * @return This object
996    */
997   public SchemaInfo setExternalDocs(ExternalDocumentation value) {
998      externalDocs = value;
999      return this;
1000   }
1001
1002   /**
1003    * Bean property setter:  <property>format</property>.
1004    *
1005    * @param value
1006    *    The new value for this property.
1007    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1008    *    <br>Formats defined by the OAS include:
1009    *    <ul>
1010    *       <li><js>"int32"</js>
1011    *       <li><js>"int64"</js>
1012    *       <li><js>"float"</js>
1013    *       <li><js>"double"</js>
1014    *       <li><js>"byte"</js>
1015    *       <li><js>"binary"</js>
1016    *       <li><js>"date"</js>
1017    *       <li><js>"date-time"</js>
1018    *       <li><js>"password"</js>
1019    *    </ul>
1020    * @return This object
1021    */
1022   public SchemaInfo setFormat(String value) {
1023      format = value;
1024      return this;
1025   }
1026
1027   /**
1028    * Bean property setter:  <property>items</property>.
1029    *
1030    * @param value
1031    *    The new value for this property.
1032    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1033    * @return This object
1034    */
1035   public SchemaInfo setItems(Items value) {
1036      items = value;
1037      return this;
1038   }
1039

1050      return this;
1051   }

1064   }

1098    * @return This object

1100   public SchemaInfo setMinimum(Number value) {
1101      minimum = value;
1102      return this;
1103   }

1116   }

1127      minLength = value;

1129   }

1142   }

1164    */
1165   public SchemaInfo setNot(SchemaInfo value) {
1166      not = value;
1167      return this;
1168   }

1170   /**
1171    * Bean property setter:  <property>nullable</property>.
1172    *
1173    * @param value
1174    *    The new value for this property.
1175    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1176    * @return This object
1177    */
1178   public SchemaInfo setNullable(Boolean value) {
1179      nullable = value;
1180      return this;
1181   }
1182
1183   /**
1184    * Bean property setter:  <property>allOf</property>.
1185    *
1186    * @param value
1187    *    The new value for this property.
1188    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1189    * @return This object
1190    */
1191   public SchemaInfo setOneOf(Collection<Object> value) {
1192      oneOf.clear();
1193      if (nn(value))
1194         oneOf.addAll(value);
1195      return this;
1196   }
1197
1198   /**
1199    * Bean property setter:  <property>pattern</property>.
1200    *
1201    * <p>
1202    * This string SHOULD be a valid regular expression.
1203    *
1204    * @param value
1205    *    The new value for this property.
1206    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1207    * @return This object
1208    */
1209   public SchemaInfo setPattern(String value) {
1210      pattern = value;
1211      return this;
1212   }
1213
1214   /**
1215    * Bean property setter:  <property>properties</property>.
1216    *
1217    * @param value
1218    *    The new value for this property.
1219    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1220    * @return This object
1221    */
1222   public SchemaInfo setProperties(Map<String,SchemaInfo> value) {
1223      properties = copyOf(value);
1224      return this;
1225   }
1226
1227   /**
1228    * Bean property setter:  <property>readOnly</property>.
1229    *
1230    * @param value
1231    *    The new value for this property.
1232    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1233    * @return This object
1234    */
1235   public SchemaInfo setReadOnly(Boolean value) {
1236      readOnly = value;
1237      return this;
1238   }
1239
1240   /**
1241    * Bean property setter:  <property>$ref</property>.
1242    *
1243    * @param value
1244    *    The new value for this property.
1245    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1246    * @return This object
1247    */
1248   @BeanProp("$ref")
1249   public SchemaInfo setRef(Object value) {
1250      ref = s(value);
1251      return this;
1252   }
1253
1254   /**
1255    * Bean property setter:  <property>required</property>.
1256    *
1257    * <p>
1258    * The list of required properties.
1259    *
1260    * @param value
1261    *    The new value for this property.
1262    *    <br>Valid values:
1263    *    <ul>
1264    *       <li><js>"http"</js>
1265    *       <li><js>"https"</js>
1266    *       <li><js>"ws"</js>
1267    *       <li><js>"wss"</js>
1268    *    </ul>
1269    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1270    * @return This object
1271    */
1272   public SchemaInfo setRequired(Collection<String> value) {
1273      required.clear();
1274      if (nn(value))
1275         required.addAll(value);
1276      return this;
1277   }
1278
1279   /**
1280    * Bean property setter:  <property>title</property>.
1281    *
1282    * @param value
1283    *    The new value for this property.
1284    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1285    * @return This object
1286    */
1287   public SchemaInfo setTitle(String value) {
1288      title = value;
1289      return this;
1290   }
1291
1292   /**
1293    * Bean property setter:  <property>type</property>.
1294    *
1295    * @param value
1296    *    The new value for this property.
1297    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1298    *    <br>Possible values include:
1299    *    <ul>
1300    *       <li><js>"object"</js>
1301    *       <li><js>"string"</js>
1302    *       <li><js>"number"</js>
1303    *       <li><js>"integer"</js>
1304    *       <li><js>"boolean"</js>
1305    *       <li><js>"array"</js>
1306    *       <li><js>"file"</js>
1307    *    </ul>
1308    * @return This object
1309    */
1310   public SchemaInfo setType(String value) {
1311      type = value;
1312      return this;
1313   }
1314
1315   /**
1316    * Bean property setter:  <property>uniqueItems</property>.
1317    *
1318    * @param value
1319    *    The new value for this property.
1320    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1321    * @return This object
1322    */
1323   public SchemaInfo setUniqueItems(Boolean value) {
1324      uniqueItems = value;
1325      return this;
1326   }
1327
1328   /**
1329    * Bean property setter:  <property>WriteOnly</property>.
1330    *
1331    * @param value
1332    *    The new value for this property.
1333    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1334    * @return This object
1335    */
1336   public SchemaInfo setWriteOnly(Boolean value) {
1337      writeOnly = value;
1338      return this;
1339   }
1340
1341   /**
1342    * Bean property setter:  <property>xml</property>.
1343    *
1344    * @param value
1345    *    The new value for this property.
1346    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1347    * @return This object
1348    */
1349   public SchemaInfo setXml(Xml value) {
1350      xml = value;
1351      return this;
1352   }
1353
1354   @Override /* Overridden from OpenApiElement */
1355   public SchemaInfo strict() {
1356      super.strict();
1357      return this;
1358   }
1359
1360   @Override /* Overridden from OpenApiElement */
1361   public SchemaInfo strict(Object value) {
1362      super.strict(value);
1363      return this;
1364   }
1365}
